diagrams.title: Fogg's Behavior Model Triangle
diagrams.description: Shows B = MAT: Behavior occurs at intersection of Motivation, Ability, and Trigger
diagrams.purpose: Understanding when user actions occur - all three must be present

diagrams.title: Hook Model Cycle
diagrams.description: Circular diagram showing four phases: Trigger → Action → Variable Reward → Investment → (back to Trigger)
diagrams.purpose: Creating habit-forming products through cyclical engagement

diagrams.title: Visual Hierarchy F-Pattern
diagrams.description: Shows how users scan pages: top horizontal scan, secondary vertical scan - creating F-pattern attention
diagrams.purpose: Placing important elements where users naturally look

diagrams.title: Cognitive Load Management
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how to reduce mental effort through progressive disclosure and chunking
diagrams.purpose: Minimizing user mental effort for better UX
